changes: Blota: Heavy effect duration has been reduced from 3 to 2 seconds.
Eventide: Minimum potency has been reduced from 12,000 to 8,000.
Rough Divide: Maximum charges have been increased from 2 to 3.
Three Mudra: Charge time has been reduced from 16 to 15 seconds.
World-swallower: Noxious Gnash effect duration has been increased from 10 to 12 seconds.
Slipstream: Potency has been increased from 8,000 to 9,000.
Slipstream: Damage over time potency has been increased from 4,000 to 4,500.
Afflatus Purgation: Potency has been increased from 16,000 to 18,000.
Phlegma III: Bind effect duration has been decreased from 3 to 2 seconds.

new_content.name: Pilgrim's Traverse
new_content.description: A deep dungeon that challenges a party of one to four players with an ever-changing landscape filled with traps, monsters, and other perils, featuring an independent leveling system.

new_content.name: The Windward Wilds
new_content.description: A trial for eight players, featuring the Guardian Arkveld as a boss.
new_content.npc_location: Dawn Hunt Tracker in Tuliyollal (X:13.3 Y:13.1)

new_content.name: The Windward Wilds (Extreme)
new_content.description: A high-difficulty version of the Windward Wilds trial, accessible via Raid Finder.

new_content.name: The Final Verse
new_content.description: A boss duty identical to the boss fought at stone 99 of Pilgrim's Traverse.

new_content.name: The Final Verse (Quantum)
new_content.description: A challenging duty implementing a new difficulty scaling system based on 'sacramental offerings'.

new_content.name: Pilgrimage of Light
new_content.description: Sidequest required to unlock Pilgrim's Traverse.

new_content.name: Faerie Tale
new_content.description: Sidequest required to unlock Pilgrim's Traverse weaponry.

new_content.name: Frosty Neighbors
new_content.description: The first main quest for the Yok Huy allied society.

new_content.name: Quest Sync
new_content.description: An automatic level adjustment system for allied society quests that matches difficulty to the player's current class level.

new_content.name: Yok Huy Allied Society
new_content.description: A new society featuring daily quests, reputation rewards, and societal currency (Yok Huy wards).

new_content.name: Deep Dungeon System
new_content.description: A system allowing players to enter special instanced areas with independent leveling, aetherpool gear, and random treasure coffers.

new_content.name: Sacramental Offerings
new_content.description: A system used to adjust boss behavior and difficulty in The Final Verse (Quantum).

new_content.name: Monster Hunter Wilds Crossover
new_content.description: A new collaboration feature including a duty and related rewards.

housing.name: Wilds Pendant Lamp
housing.description: A pendant lamp inspired by tales of hunters from another world.

housing.name: Yok Huy Lantern
housing.description: A solemn stone lantern similar to those found flanking the steps of the Breathless Altar at Zirgorteh the Open-armed.

housing.name: Traverse Clocktower
housing.description: Crafted to resemble the clocktower awaiting adventurers who tread the furthest reaches of Pilgrim's Traverse, this timepiece makes an imposing, somewhat hypnotic addition to any garden.

housing.name: Traverse Tree
housing.description: Native to the environs of Pilgrim's Traverse, this bulbous arboreal bloom casts an otherworldly glow.

housing.name: Outdoor Hunter's Grill
housing.description: A portable grill used by hunters to cook raw meat and other ingredients.

housing.name: Makeshift Camp
housing.description: A hastily assembled camp for the hunter who cares little and less for comfort.

housing.name: Pop-up Camp
housing.description: A pop-up facility used by hunters on the go to quickly change equipment.

housing.name: Hunter's Camp Chair
housing.description: A foldable seat employed by many a hunter in the field, and only in the field.

housing.name: Palanx Striking Dummy
housing.description: A striking dummy designed to resemble a stalwart Felyne friend.

housing.name: Guardian Arkveld's Windward Plains Phasmascape
housing.description: This advanced magitek contraption displays a harrowing battle with the dread Guardian Arkveld.

housing.name: Rey Dau's Windward Plains Phasmascape
housing.description: This advanced magitek contraption displays the wide, sweeping landscape of the Windward Plains.

housing.name: Uth Duna's Scarlet Forest Phasmascape
housing.description: This advanced magitek contraption displays the tumultuous waters and woods of Uth Duna's Scarlet Forest.

housing.name: Omega's Iceshard Cliffs Phasmascape
housing.description: This advanced magitek contraption displays the ultimate weapon, Omega, atop the Iceshard Cliffs.

housing.name: Jin Dahaad's Iceshard Cliffs Phasmascape
housing.description: This advanced magitek contraption displays the serpentine menace, Jin Dahaad, atop the Iceshard Cliffs.

housing.name: Nu Udra's Oilwell Basin Phasmascape
housing.description: This advanced magitek contraption displays the six-limbed terror, Nu Udra, in the sweltering heat of the Oilwell Basin.

housing.name: Hunter's Lodge Chair
housing.description: A foldable seat employed by many a hunter at home, where its camp-specific cousin simply will not do.

housing.name: Wilds Great Sword Stand
housing.description: A simple weapon stand bearing a crude but surprisingly powerful blade.

housing.name: Indoor Hunter's Grill
housing.description: A simple grill used by particularly ravenous hunters who crave BBQ more than they fear suffocation by meat smoke in ill-ventilated lodges.

housing.name: Lyhe Ghiah Stained Crystal Ornament
housing.description: An iridescent, intricately detailed wall ornament modeled after the windows that adorn the twinkling edifice of Lyhe Ghiah.

housing.name: Wilds Banner
housing.description: A banner said to be adored by hunters of another world.
